title: File
description: A Slack file object representing an uploaded file with its metadata and sharing information.

created.description: Unix timestamp of when the file was created.

user.description: User ID of the user who uploaded the file.

user_team.description: Team ID of the user who uploaded the file.

editable.description: Whether the file content is editable.

is_external.description: Whether the file is externally hosted.

url_private.description: URL to access the file. Requires authentication.

url_private_download.description: URL to download the file. Requires authentication.

permalink_public.description: Public permalink URL for the file (if shared publicly).

channels.description: Array of channel IDs where the file is shared.

groups.description: Array of private channel IDs where the file is shared.

ims.description: Array of DM IDs where the file is shared.

shares.description: Sharing information broken down by type.

comments_count.description: Number of comments on the file.
